appMeta.defaultTitle: Nadeshiko: Search Japanese sentences from anime
appMeta.defaultDescription: Search over 1 million Japanese sentences with English and Spanish translations from a wide variety of anime and J-dramas.

home.nadeDbDescription: A tool for searching japanese sentences from multiple contexts.

feature1.title: Compatible with Anki
feature1.description: Save any sentence in Anki including image, audio, and multiple languages.

feature2.title: Save any sentence
feature2.description: Save sentences in multiple formats such as images, audios, and videos.

feature3.title: View the context of what you find
feature3.description: See what happened before or after a sentence.

feature4.title: Rich and diverse content
feature4.description: Enjoy different genres, different media, different voices.

support.title: Do you like Nadeshiko?
support.description: If you find this site useful, you can support our work and future development with a contribution on our GitHub, a donation, or by sharing this site with others.

batchSearch.title: Simultaneous Search
batchSearch.description1: This feature can be used to search multiple words at once. A list will be returned with the words that have been found in the database, and a link to that specific search
batchSearch.description2: To start, add some words on the box below
batchSearch.description3: Add one word per line, or a coma separated list of words
batchSearch.description4: You can only search up to

searchSettingsModal.exactMatchDescription: Perform an exact match search, without including conjugations or other results

anki.configRequired: Configure Anki in Settings to use this feature

modal.title: Search your collection
modal.description: Find a card in your Anki collection and add image/audio to it. Requires 'Key Field' to be configured in settings.
modal.noCardsMessage: Try a different query or mine the sentence first
modal.errorMessage: No key field has been defined
modal.errorTip: Verify the key field is defined in Nadeshiko settings

toast.noSettings: No settings found. Please go to settings page and configure the extension.
toast.noCardToExport: No Anki card to export to. Please add a card first.
toast.cardFoundInOtherDeck: Card found but not in deck "{deck}". Check that Yomitan and Nadeshiko are using the same deck.
toast.cardAdded: Card has been successfully added to Anki
toast.cardAddError: Could not add card to Anki. Error: {error}

modalBatch.wordLimitExceeded: The word limit has been exceeded: {count} / 500
modalBatch.inputFormatError: The input format is incorrect. Check if there are commas and line breaks simultaneously.
modalBatch.examplePlaceholder:
彼女
彼氏
走る
恋人
...
...
...

modalSegmentEdit.title: Edit Segment
modalSegmentEdit.ratingAnalysisDesc: WD Tagger v3 classifier output (scores/tags) used to derive content rating
modalSegmentEdit.posAnalysisDesc: Part-of-speech tokenization results keyed by engine (sudachi, unidic)
modalSegmentEdit.deleteEpisodeConfirm: Delete episode {episode} and all its segments?

labels.copiedcontent: The content has been copied to the clipboard.
labels.copiedsharingurl: The URL has been copied to the clipboard.
labels.errorcopiedsharingurl: Error copying URL to clipboard. Try again.
labels.collectionAddFailed: Could not add to collection. Try again.
labels.mtTooltip: This sentence has been machine translated, content might not be accurate

announcement.title: Announcement
announcement.description: Set a site-wide announcement banner visible to all users.
announcement.activeDescription: When active, the banner is shown to all visitors.

activity.confirmClearHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all activity history? This cannot be undone.
activity.confirmClearDay: Delete all activity for {day}? This cannot be undone.

overview.title: Activity Overview
overview.description: Useful metrics from your search and study behavior.

heatmap.title: Activity Heatmap
heatmap.description: Activity over the last {days} days. Click a day to filter history.

history.title: Activity History
history.deleteDayTitle: Delete all activity for this day
history.emptyForDay: No activity recorded for this day.
history.emptyForType: No activity recorded for this type.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.trackingDescription: Track searches, exports, and listening history.
privacy.clearHistoryDescription: Permanently delete all activity data from your account.

usageLimitMessage.prefix: If you need to increase your API usage limit, please reach out to us at

legacyKeysMessage.prefix: To manage API keys created on the previous version of the site, visit

developer.keyCreatedMessage: Save this key, it won't be shown again.
developer.noKeysMessage: Create a new one for your apps or projects!

createApiKeyModal.title: Create API Key
createApiKeyModal.namePlaceholder: Enter a name for this API key

renameApiKeyModal.title: Rename API Key
renameApiKeyModal.namePlaceholder: Enter a new name for this API key

account.mediaNameLanguageDescription: Media names will appear in {language} when possible. Example:
account.tokenPopupReadingDescription: How readings are shown in the token popup when hovering over Japanese text.
account.confirmDeleteAccount: This action permanently deletes your account. Continue?
account.deleteAccountError: Unable to delete account. You may need to sign in again and retry.
account.exportDataDescription: Download all your data as a JSON file.
account.contentRatingHint_show: Results will be included in search and not blurred
account.contentRatingHint_blur: Results will be included in search but blurred
account.contentRatingHint_hide: Results will not be included in search
account.contentRatingPreview: Preview of how flagged results will appear in search
account.contentRatingPreviewAlt: Preview image for content rating sample
account.contentRatingHiddenDesc: Hidden — will not be included in search results
account.changeEmailSuccess: A verification email has been sent to your current email address. Please check your inbox.

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.confirmRevokeAll: This will revoke all your sessions, including this one. Continue?

errors.revokeSingle: Unable to revoke this session. Please sign in again and retry.
errors.revokeOthers: Unable to revoke other sessions. Please sign in again and retry.
errors.revokeAll: Unable to revoke all sessions. Please sign in again and retry.

account.hiddenMediaDescription: Media hidden from search results. You can also hide media from the overflow menu on any search result.
account.hiddenMediaEmpty: No hidden media. Search results will include all available media.
account.hiddenMediaNoResults: No media found for this query.

collections.title: Collections
collections.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
collections.makePublicMessage: Make "{name}" public? Anyone will be able to view this collection.
collections.makePrivateMessage: Make "{name}" private? Only you will be able to view this collection.

anki.successMessage: Connection with Anki has been successfully established
anki.errorMessage: Could not establish connection with Anki

troubleshootingTips.ankiRunning: Make sure Anki is running and the Ankiconnect addon is installed
troubleshootingTips.webCors: Make sure 'https://nadeshiko.co' is in AnkiConnect's webCorsOriginList settings
troubleshootingTips.adBlock: Disable any AdBlock extensions for this domain

anki.selectKeyField: Select the field that corresponds to your deck ID
anki.noFieldsMessage: Please try again or check your AnkiConnect connection
anki.openBrowserOnExport: Open Anki browser when exporting a card

labs.title: Nadeshiko Labs
labs.description: Try experimental features before they are released to everyone!
labs.feedbackDescription: These features are still under testing and might change at any time, but we would love to hear your feedback to help us improve them before they become default features in Nadeshiko.
labs.empty: No lab features available at this time.

contentPage.emptyMessage: Stay tuned; it will be added later 😉

segment.noResultsMessage: Try a different search or search in {link}

searchContainer.errorMessage2: Try searching again with the button below.
searchContainer.hiddenMediaNotice: This media is in your hidden list
searchContainer.hiddenMediaDescription: You've hidden this media from your search results. You can still view it temporarily.

reports.descriptionPlaceholder: Provide additional details about the issue...
reports.loginRequired: Please log in to use this feature

confirm.dismissAllDescription: This will dismiss all reports matching the current filters. This action can be undone by reopening individual reports.
confirm.deleteAllDescription: This will permanently delete all reports matching the current filters. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteGroupDescription: This will permanently delete this report and all duplicates with the same target and reason.

labels.banneduser: Your account has been suspended. Please contact support.
labels.errorlogin400: Please check your email/password and try again.

magiclink.label: Or sign in with your email
magiclink.sent: Check your email for a sign-in link.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.hint: Shortcuts are disabled while typing in the search bar. Press ? to toggle this panel.

home.title: Nadeshiko: Search Japanese sentences from anime
home.description: Search over 1 million Japanese sentences with English and Spanish translations from a wide variety of anime and J-dramas.

stats.title: Stats
stats.description: See how well Nadeshiko covers the most common Japanese words. Coverage statistics based on the Jiten anime frequency list.

statsWords.title: {tier} Japanese Words Coverage
statsWords.description: See which of the {tier} most common Japanese words are covered by Nadeshiko's sentence corpus.

media.title: Browse Media
media.description: Browse anime, J-dramas, and audiobooks available on Nadeshiko. Search through thousands of media titles with Japanese sentences.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Stay updated with the latest news, features, and improvements to Nadeshiko.

search.title: Search
search.defaultDescription: Search over 1 million Japanese sentences with English and Spanish translations from a wide variety of anime and J-dramas.
search.descriptionWithResults: {count} example sentences containing "{query}"{breakdown} with English and Spanish translations.
search.descriptionNoResults: Search for "{query}" in over 1 million Japanese sentences from anime and J-dramas, with English and Spanish translations.
search.mediaDescription: {count} Japanese sentences from {media} with English and Spanish translations.
search.mediaDescriptionEpisode: {count} Japanese sentences from {media} episode {episode} with English and Spanish translations.
search.mediaDescriptionEpisodes: {count} Japanese sentences from {media} across {episodeCount} episodes with English and Spanish translations.

sentence.title: Sentence
sentence.defaultDescription: Search over 1 million Japanese sentences with English and Spanish translations from a wide variety of anime and J-dramas.

statsPage.title: Nadeshiko in Numbers

intro.prefix: How well does our corpus cover the Japanese language? We measure against the
intro.suffix: anime frequency list, built from {totalWords} unique words across thousands of anime.

statsPage.loadError: Failed to load statistics. Try refreshing the page.

translations.title: Translation Availability
translations.description: Every sentence has Japanese subtitles. We aim to include English and Spanish translations for all content. Some sources lack reliable Spanish subtitles, so coverage may be lower for that language.

statsWordsPage.title: Word Coverage

description.suffix: anime frequency list and their coverage in Nadeshiko's corpus.

statsWordsPage.empty: No words match the current filter.
